name: $WALLET_MANIFEST_NAME
description: One fast, accessible, and secure platform for digital assets, DApps, NFTs, and DeFi.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src $CARDANO_SERVICES_URLS $COINGECKO_URL $MUESLISWAP_URL $LOCALHOST_CONNECT_SRC $POSTHOG_URL $TYPEKIT_URL data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:;
